servers.name: central-mcp
servers.description: Platform-wide service hub. Architect-scope access for engagement notifications + Coolify awareness.
servers.notes: Set CENTRAL_MCP_TOKEN env in .env after operator provisions a consultative-agent token in central-mcp config. Then flip enabled to true.
